lines.text: Sunset 9 at Oak Trail Golf Course | Walt Disney World Resort
Sunset 9-Hole Golf Promotion
MultipleWalt Disney World® Resortlocations
Swing over to select Disney golf courses and score special pricing—along with 2 complimentary beverages—on an exhilarating 9-hole round of golf.
Tweens
Teens
Adults
Highlights
Discover what’s included with these promotions—and explore participating locations.
What’s Included
When you take advantage of the Sunset 9-Hole promotion, you can:
Play a 9-hole round of golf on one of the participating Walt Disney World golf courses
Enjoy use of a golf cart during your round
Choose 2 beverages from a selection of domestic beers and soft drinks

Best of all, when you end your day with a 9-hole round of golf, you’ll still have plenty of time to spend with your family at the theme parks, attend that important business meeting or relax poolside!
Participating Locations
This promotion is available at the following Walt Disney World golf courses:
Disney’s Lake Buena Vista Golf Course
Disney’s Magnolia Golf Course
Disney’s Palm Golf Course
Learn more about the Sunset 9-Hole Golf Promotion.
How to Book
To schedule a tee time, please call (407) WDW-GOLF or (407) 939-4653. Or click here to book online. Guests under 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
View the CDC recommendations on hand-washing.
Related Activities
Disney’s Oak Trail Golf Course
Tee off on a lush, 9-hole walking course with rolling hills, exciting challenges and scenic beauty.
Golf Lessons
Take your golf game to the next level or learn basic techniques during lessons with a PGA professional.
